description: Remove topic article type. Delete wiki/topics/ files and strip [[Topic - ...]] wikilinks from remaining article bodies.
llm_instructions: a. Glob 'wiki/topics/**/*.md'. If any matches, delete each file.
b. Glob 'wiki/**/*.md' and read frontmatter; delete any file whose 'type' field equals 'topic' (case-insensitive) that is not already inside wiki/topics/.
c. If wiki/topics/ now exists and is empty, remove the directory.
d. For each deletion, append a line to wiki/_migration-log.md or wiki/_log.md noting the removed path.
Step 2 — Strip topic wikilinks from surviving article bodies:
b. In each file's body (not frontmatter), remove any wikilink matching the regex `\[\[\s*Topic\s*-\s*[^\]|#]+(?:\|[^\]]+)?\]\]`.
c. If the wikilink is the sole bullet/line content, remove the entire line. Otherwise leave surrounding prose intact.
d. If removing the wikilink leaves an empty '## See Also' or '## Part of Topics' section, drop the heading + empty line pair.
e. Update the article's 'updated:' frontmatter field to today when any edit is made.
a. For every article, scan the 'sources:' list; drop any entry whose wikilink points into the former wiki/topics/ directory.
Idempotency: Re-running this step must be a no-op once all topic artifacts are gone.
